---
title: "Chapter 12: Culturally Responsive Evaluation"
description: "Chapter-level study notes for Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation."
book_id: "handbook-practical-program-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Chapter"
chapter_number: 12
source_pages: "331-360"
citation_key: "newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch12-chapter-12-culturally-responsive-evaluation:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-1:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---

# Chapter 12: Culturally Responsive Evaluation

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>331-360</span><span>Part 1: Evaluation Planning and Design</span><span>Source status: needs_review</span></div>

## Core Claim

Culturally responsive evaluation embeds cultural context, equity, and stakeholder voice in evaluation design and use.

## Summary

The chapter extends design beyond technical fit to cultural fit.

It asks evaluators to attend to communities, values, language, power, and interpretation when framing questions and judging evidence.

Cultural responsiveness affects the full evaluation cycle: engagement, data collection, analysis, reporting, and use.

## Key Concepts

- **culturally responsive evaluation**: Evaluation that attends to cultural context, stakeholder voice, and equity in design and use.
- **stakeholder engagement**: Deliberate identification, analysis, and involvement of intended users and affected parties.
- **use**: Application of evaluation evidence to decisions, improvement, accountability, or learning.

## Practice Implications

- Build cultural context into the design, not only dissemination.
- Use engagement to test whether questions and methods are respectful and valid.
- Interpret findings with attention to power and context.

## Source Records

- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch12-chapter-12-culturally-responsive-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-1:c0001`

## References

These notes summarise source-linked records from *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation* [@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation].
